/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Function, symbols, Wild, Symbol
samples = [
    ('flat string', 'q:2'),
    ('tuple', ('q:2', 'u:2')),
    ('nested tuple', (('q:2',),)),
    ('list', ['q:2']),
]
for label, names in samples:
    value = symbols(names, cls=Function)
    obj = value
    while isinstance(obj, (tuple, list)):
        obj = obj[0]
    print(label, type(obj), value)
print('wild nested', type(symbols(('x',), cls=Wild)[0]))
print('assumption nested', symbols(('x',), real=True)[0].is_real)
PY
nl -ba sympy/core/symbol.py | sed -n '704,805p'
nl -ba sympy/core/tests/test_symbol.py | sed -n '286,302p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"symbols\\(["'^'"\\n]*cls=|symbols\\(\\(\" sympy --glob '*.py' | head -n 120 && ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Dummy, Function, Wild, symbols
cases = [
    ('tuple ranges', ('q:2', 'u:2')),
    ('tuple plain', ('q', 'u')),
    ('list ranges', ['q:2', 'u:2']),
    ('nested', (('q:2',), ['u:2'])),
]
for label, names in cases:
    for cls in (Function, Wild, Dummy):
        value = symbols(names, cls=cls)
        def leaves(item):
            if isinstance(item, (tuple, list, set)):
                return [x for child in item for x in leaves(child)]
            return [item]
        print(label, cls.__name__, type(leaves(value)[0]).__name__)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"symbols\\(["'^'"\\n]*cls=|symbols\\(\\(\" sympy --glob '*.py' | head -n 120 && ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Dummy, Function, Wild, symbols
cases = [
    ('tuple ranges', ('q:2', 'u:2')),
    ('tuple plain', ('q', 'u')),
    ('list ranges', ['q:2', 'u:2']),
    ('nested', (('q:2',), ['u:2'])),
]
for label, names in cases:
    for cls in (Function, Wild, Dummy):
        value = symbols(names, cls=cls)
        def leaves(item):
            if isinstance(item, (tuple, list, set)):
                return [x for child in item for x in leaves(child)]
            return [item]
        print(label, cls.__name__, type(leaves(value)[0]).__name__)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Dummy, Function, Wild, symbols
from sympy.core.function import UndefinedFunction

q, u = symbols(('q:2', 'u:2'), cls=Function)
assert all(type(item) is UndefinedFunction for group in (q, u) for item in group)

for cls in (Dummy, Wild):
    values = symbols((('a',), ['b:2']), cls=cls)
    leaves = (values[0][0], *values[1])
    assert all(isinstance(item, cls) for item in leaves)

print(type(q[0]))
PY
git diff --check
git diff -- sympy/core/symbol.py
git status --short"
